title: ML Feedback Recommendation
description: A recommendation from an ix ML pipeline to Demerzel for governance improvement

pipeline_id.description: Which ML pipeline produced this recommendation

rationale.description: Why this recommendation was generated, with data references

expected_impact.description: Predicted effect of applying this recommendation

parameters.description: Recommendation-specific parameters (e.g., new threshold values, target repos)

confidence.description: ML pipeline's confidence in this recommendation

data_points.description: Number of data points supporting this recommendation

model_version.description: Version of the ML model that produced this recommendation

training_window.description: Time range of data used for this recommendation (e.g., '2026-02-17 to 2026-03-17')

key_features.description: Most influential features in the recommendation

passed.description: Whether the recommendation passed constitutional self-check

articles_checked.description: Constitutional articles verified (e.g., ['Article 3 - Reversibility', 'Article 9 - Bounded Autonomy'])

concerns.description: Any constitutional concerns identified (empty if none)

expires_at.description: When this recommendation becomes stale and should be regenerated
